# web服务解析

- 监听者 :8333

```shell
rk3588_t:/ $ cat /proc/net/tcp
  sl  local_address rem_address   st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
   0: 00000000:1F49 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000 10052        0 73791 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   1: 00000000:208D 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 72192 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   2: 00000000:CE2D 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 69649 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   3: 0100007F:0035 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1052        0 51517 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   4: FE99A8C0:0035 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1052        0 51515 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   5: 00000000:1CD6 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000 10052        0 47895 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   6: 00000000:075B 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 53082 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   7: 00000000:9E3D 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000 10052        0 71601 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   8: 00000000:1F48 00000000:0000 0A 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000 10052        0 69763 1 0000000000000000 100 0 0 10 0
   9: 0100007F:075B 0100007F:8D62 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 69655 1 0000000000000000 20 4 31 10 -1
  10: 0100007F:075B 0100007F:A038 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 70590 1 0000000000000000 20 4 31 10 -1
  11: 0100007F:075B 0100007F:A488 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 69907 1 0000000000000000 20 4 31 10 -1
  12: 0100007F:075B 0100007F:8D56 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 57331 1 0000000000000000 20 4 31 10 -1
  13: 2321A8C0:A144 980E1F76:22B3 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000  1000        0 77868 1 0000000000000000 24 4 30 10 -1
```

可见 8333端口为208D，监听者用户id是1000

```shell
rk3588_t:/ $ dumpsys package com.cvte.maxhub.settings | grep userId
    userId=1000
    userId=1000
rk3588_t:/ $ dumpsys package  com.cvte.ciot.service | grep userId
    userId=1000
    userId=1000
    userId=1000
```
